Put in front of me I've got to like go find that Yeah We are always here something to keep in mind because it can always consistently shocks me But you should never underestimate their ability to ignore us You would all if you got a hundred of your customers together in a room and started to ask them questions about what they know about you And what they know about your products and what they know about your business you would be shocked at what they don't know Even though you think you've put this in front of them six million times They don't know it. We have it all the time with events You know the last week somebody's calling up truck, huh what I didn't even know about that How could you not know about it? It's been in every newsletter. I mean if you started focus group with your customers, you'd be amazed at what's not getting through I just wanted to comment on that because that it's that was one of the toughest things for me to get over the last few years But as I've as I've started to coach other people as I've really sort of made my employees drink more of the Kool-Aid I think the biggest thing to get some to be the broken record and do it happily and regularly is Is just to view things more as a performance Really is when I start talking about things being a performance, you know I talk about the Yule Brinner story and all that sort of thing that seems to resonate a little bit No, that doesn't mean they're always gonna be they're gonna nail the performance But at least it gets them warmed up to the idea that they're gonna be a broken record from here to eternity And we all are we all have to be Okay Yes Like Chris told me personal story about Being a teacher school teacher being a graphic artist Plus how he got to meet his and grow as a martial artist How do you? And I mean it's points of connection. Yeah. Oh, yeah, I do It's your points of it's points of connection, right? So Somewhere out there. I mean somewhere out there. I mean so like like, you know, like the question I will get all the time is well, why are you still working? Okay, now There's a real answer to that and there's a quasi real answer and the quasi real answer is the one most want to hear right, you know, they don't really want to hear well because I'm such a obsessive compulsive addicted individual. I can't figure out how to quit You know, I don't have enough power to say no to as much as I should See those answers that wasn't what they were looking for, you know, it's pretty clear what they're looking for You know, they're looking for well because I care about you, you know, because well, that is what they're looking for Right. It's because I and somebody had it in their copy and it's good copy. Well, you know I'm doing it for the money that they don't want to hear, you know Now so like I'll give them that answer funny Right. I work for oats I'm doing it because I got all these horses, you know, and that's okay But really what they want to hear is to that question That's because I care so deeply about you now I'm not going to say it exactly that way because that's of course complete bullshit and You know, so now I'm out of integrity if I give that answer but I mean there's a answer that's That's got enough truth that it from my side that is palatable to them But you know, you got to think about that people want to know why you're there and How you got there? Why are you here? You know, what are you about again? and So at some point they want to know why Charlie's a dentist, you know, they want to know why you do what you do Okay, and so like so see Jack's story was missing a link when I got him So Jack's story was I'm an ex-delivery man thief I drove a red truck drove Pepsi truck stole stole from everybody that I delivered to and that's why I know all the ways That people steal I mean it was working for him, but what he was leaving out was the religious conversion In his case, so he was leaving out the I'm a reformed deliver man thief because I had a Moral revelation and now want to protect the very people I was stealing from and make good and do good things for the bit so now that gives a mission statement and so now He's more accepted, you know, the story works.
